## Profile.getLiveContext() method

GetLiveContext returns the live workspace context (e.g., "wksp_123") from the config file. Ported from: profile.go LiveContext field

**Signature:**

```typescript
getLiveContext(): string | null;
```

**Returns:**

string \| null
